title: The black silence
description: I made Black Silence, which appears in Project Moon.
body:
**I made Black Silence, which appears in Project Moon.**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/lHyQOrNrJiI" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Black Silence can be obtained in Creative mode and can be activated by pressing a specific key.
When activated, a weapon will fall from the sky and you can obtain it by touching it.
When you swing your weapon, a technique is activated and the weapon disappears.
Hitting an attack will earn you a score, and you will receive a buff depending on the score.

**It is not intended for multiple people to use at the same time.**




<details>
<summary>Weapon</summary>
  
- **Durandal** Grants self strength after two slashing attacks
- **Mook** Backing up and then cutting ahead at high speed
- **Old boy** Enters parry state. If parry is successful, gain bonus HP.
- **Ranga** Performs three consecutive slashes at high speed
- **Zelkova** Destroys the opponent's shield and delivers two hits
- **Crystal** Dash and then slash twice
- **Allas** Penetrates and inflicts weakness on enemies
- **Wheels ndustry** Perform a powerful striking attack
- **Logic** Two shots followed by a powerful shot
  
</details>

<details>
<summary>Skill?</summary>
  
- **Black ■■■■■■** Summon weapon [Initial key Numlock]
- **TP** Teleport to a weapon in the direction of your viewpoint [Z]
</details>





~~If you find the code, please don't publish it~~
